message:
Integrate 3D fullscreen mode and AA legend into TUI components

Wire up the new fullscreen 3D view, quality controls, and amino acid
legend throughout the TUI layer with comprehensive keyboard handling
and optimized rendering.

App.tsx Changes:
- Remove all mouse tracking infrastructure (ENABLE_MOUSE/DISABLE_MOUSE
  escape sequences, stdin data handlers, SGR event parsing)
- Remove unused imports: useStdin, useCallback, useMemo
- Remove hoveredAminoAcid state management and position tracking refs
- Replace AminoAcidHoverInfo with AALegend (conditional on AA view)
- Add fullscreen 3D mode: when active, renders only Model3DView at
  full terminal dimensions with minimal footer controls
- Add keyboard bindings: Z (fullscreen toggle), R (quality cycle)
- Escape key now exits fullscreen first, then closes overlays
- In fullscreen mode, only P/Z/R/Q keys are active to prevent
  accidental navigation

Model3DView.tsx Changes:
- Accept new 'fullscreen' prop for rendering mode selection
- Integrate quality setting from store into render config
- Enable block characters (░▒▓█) in ultra quality fullscreen mode
- Adjust refresh rate: 60ms (~16 FPS) fullscreen vs 100ms (10 FPS) PiP
- Calculate render dimensions accounting for borders and title rows
- Add dedicated fullscreen layout with quality indicator in title bar
- Add keyboard hints to PiP footer: "P:play/stop Z:zoom"
- Remove unused useCallback import

This completes the fullscreen 3D viewing feature, allowing users to
press Z to zoom into an immersive phage model view with higher quality
rendering, faster animation, and optional Unicode block shading.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
